title: Sample Access Proposal Template
author: Laumann, Susanne
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is a template to write a short proposal for access to physical samples from the TU Delft campus geothermal well (DEL-GT-01 & DEL-GT-02) and the multi-purpose research well (DAPGEO-02).  
 In this link is the complete procedure:  Sample and data access procedure
steps_raw:
This is a template to write a short proposal for access to physical samples from the TU Delft campus geothermal well (DEL-GT-01 & DEL-GT-02) and the multi-purpose research well (DAPGEO-02).
